svg.text: src/gemm.c · one column tile j : j+vl, all 16 rows of the block · single shared B load fans out to 16 row-parallel RVV FMA lanes
for (l = 0; l < k; l++) — no unroll needed
direct store — no reduction tree needed
16 independent per-row accumulators give the pipeline row-level ILP without unrolling l at all; B[l, j:j+vl] loads once per l instead of once per (row, l), cutting B’s reload factor 16× → 1×.
j += vl → next tile · cf. opt_gemm_dataflow.svg — k-unrolled single row + reduction tree
